results.rendered_html:
kṛśana 1〉 n. Perle oder Perlmutter: devānāmasthi kṛśanaṃ babhūva  AV. 10,1,7 . abhīvṛtaṃ kṛśanairviśvarūpamāsthādrathaṃ savitā  ṚV. 1,35,4 . abhi śyāvaṃ na kṛśanebhiraśvaṃ nakṣatrebhiḥ pitaro dyāmapiṃśan 10,68,1 . nach  NAIGH. 1,2  = Gold, nach 3,7 . = rūpa Form, Gestalt.
— 2〉 adj. margaritifer: sa no hiraṇyajāḥ śaṅkhaḥ kṛśanaḥ pātvaṃhasaḥ  AV. 4,10,1 . 3 ; vgl.  KAUŚ. 58 .
— Vgl. ūrdhvakṛśana und kārśana.
